MS.S: You may play this spell after a unit or Phoenixborn you control is dealt damage. Lower up to 2 non-basic dice in your active pool one level. For each die, prevent 1 damage from being received.

[[main]] - [[exhaust]]: All players may draw up to 2 cards. For each card they cannot or do not draw, deal 1 damage to their Phoenixborn._x000A__x000A_Focus 1: Reduce the damage your Phoenixborn receives from this spell by 1._x000A__x000A_Focus 2: Reduce the damage your Phoenixborn receives from this spell by an additional 1.
Draw 1 card. Change 2 dice in your active pool to a side of your choice. You may take up to 2 additional side actions this turn.
Adapt: [[side]]: Attach a [[Fire Adaptation]] or [[Ice Adaptation]] conjured alteration spell to this unit if it has neither attached to it.
Stalk: This unit cannot be guarded against._x000A__x000A_Disarm: When this unit is declared as an attacker, you may discard a target alteration spell attached to a unit an opponent controls.
Rebuke 1: At the end of each round, deal 1 damage to a target Phoenixborn.
Deal 1 damage to a target unit you control. Remove 1 exhaustion token from that unit.
Choose a target unit you control with an attack value of 0. Add 3 to its attack value for the remainder of the turn.
Guidance: When this unit comes into play, you may draw 1 card. If you do, place 1 card from your hand on the bottom of your draw pile.
Invoke Ancestors: When this unit comes into play, place 2 [[Ancestor Spirit]] conjurations onto your battlefield.
Throw 1: When this unit comes into play, you may deal 1 damage to another target unit.

You may play this spell after a unit you control is dealt damage by a spell, ability, or dice power an opponent controls. Prevent that damage from being received, and then remove all wound tokens from that unit.

Choose a target Phoenixborn. Its controlling player may discard 1 card at random from their hand. If they do not or cannot, place 2 wound tokens on that Phoenixborn. Then choose a target Phoenixborn. Its controlling player may move 2 dice of your choice from their active pool to their exhausted pool. If they do not or cannot, place 2 wound tokens on that Phoenixborn.
Water Blast: [[side]] - [[exhaust]] - 1 [[natural:class]]: Deal 2 damage to a target unit.

Gigantic 2: This unit cannot be blocked or guarded against by units with a life value of 2 or less._x000A__x000A_* Dismount: When this unit is destroyed, place any allies you own underneath this unit into your hand.
* Valor 1: After this Phoenixborn is dealt damage while guarding or resolving its ability, prevent 1 damage from being received.
You may play this spell after you declare attackers. Choose an attacking unit. For the remainder of the turn, the chosen unit cannot be blocked or guarded against by units with a charm die on them.

To Ash: After this unit is destroyed as a result of an attack from a unit an opponent controls, destroy that target unit._x000A__x000A_Smolder 1: At the end of the round, deal 1 damage to a target Phoenixborn whose owner has no cards in their draw pile.
Beguile: [[main]] - [[exhaust]] - 1 [[basic]]: Place 1 exhaustion token on a target unexhausted unit.

When this spell comes into play, place 3 status tokens on it._x000A__x000A_[[side]] - [[exhaust]]: Search your draw pile. You may reveal 1 card with a magic play cost of X and place it into your hand. If you do, remove 1 status token from this spell. Shuffle your draw pile._x000A__x000A_X = the number of status tokens on this spell.
Return an ally you control to its owner's hand to add 3 to the attack value of another unit for the remainder of the turn.
You may play this spell after an opponent declares attackers. Choose a target attacking ally and place it into its owner's hand.

Unit Guard: This unit may guard a unit that is being attacked._x000A__x000A_Exploit 2: While this unit is in battle with a unit with a charm die on it, the attack value of this unit is increased by 2.
Quick Strike: While this unit is attacking, it deals its damage before units in battle with it._x000A__x000A_Alert: Do not place exhaustion tokens on this unit as a result of its countering.

Terrifying 1: This unit cannot be blocked or guarded against by units with an attack value of 1 or less._x000A__x000A_* Transform 2: While you do not have the first player token, the attack value, life value, and recover value of this unit are increased by 2.
Tame 1: While this unit is in battle, the attack value of units in battle with it is reduced by 1._x000A__x000A_Alert: Do not place exhaustion tokens on this unit as a result of its countering.

Group Tactics 1: After you declare three or more attackers, you may add 1 to this unit's attack value for the remainder of this turn._x000A__x000A_* Transform 1: While you do not have the first player token, the attack value, life value, and recover value of this unit are increased by 1.
Unit Guard: This unit may guard a unit that is being attacked._x000A__x000A_Rooted: This unit cannot attack.
Seal Strike 1: When this unit is declared as an attacker, you may choose a target opponent to place 1 exhaustion token on an unexhausted ready spell of their choice that they control.
Choose up to 3 divine dice in your exhausted pool and resolve their dice powers without paying their costs.
Remove a target unit from the game. At the end of this turn, place that unit onto its owner's battlefield.
Blood Shot: [[side]]: Place 1 wound token on this unit to deal 1 damage to a target unit.
Resolve the following effect once for each wound token on units you control:_x000A__x000A_You may deal 1 damage to a target unit an opponent controls.
Destroy a unit you control to place 1 exhaustion token on a target unit. If the destroyed unit had 1 or more wound tokens on it, place 2 exhaustion tokens instead.
Cursed 1: At the end of the round, place 1 wound token on your Phoenixborn._x000A__x000A_**Self-Inflict 1:** [[side]] - 1 [[basic]]: Deal 1 damage to this unit.

Stitch: When this unit comes into play, place a [[Blood Puppet]] conjuration onto your battlefield._x000A__x000A_* Restitch: When this unit is destoyed, you may discard a [[Blood Puppet]] you control to place a [[Blood Puppet]] conjuration onto a target opponent's battlefield.

* Blood Ritual 1: When this unit is destroyed as a result of a spell, ability, or dice power you control, you may remove 1 wound token from your Phoenixborn and then raise 1 die in your active pool one level.

[[side]] - [[exhaust]] - 1 [[charm:class]] - 1 [[ceremonial:class]]: Deal 2 damage to a target unit you control. If you do, you may remove 2 wound tokens from another unit you control or remove 1 wound token from your Phoenixborn.
Gaze: When this unit is declared as an attacker, you may choose a target unit an opponent controls. That unit cannot block or guard for the remainder of the turn.
[[side]] - [[exhaust]] - 1 [[illusion:class]]: Swap a target unit's printed attack value with its printed life value for the remainder of the turn.
Feast 1: When this unit is declared as an attacker, add 1 to its attack value for the remainder of the turn if it is targeting a card with any wound tokens on it.
Search your discard pile for an ally and place it into your hand.
You may play this spell after a unit you control is dealt damage. Prevent that damage from being received.
Spirit Burn: [[main]] - [[exhaust]] - 1 [[ceremonial:class]]: Destroy an ally you control to deal 2 damage to a target Phoenixborn.
* Inheritance 1: When this unit is destroyed, you may place 1 status token on a target unit._x000A__x000A_* Fade: Destroy this unit at the end of this round.
Unit Guard: This unit may guard a unit that is being attacked._x000A__x000A_* Mend 1: When this unit is destroyed, you may remove 1 wound token from a target unit or Phoenixborn.
Rancor: When this unit is declared as an attacker, deal damage to a target unit an opponent controls equal to the number of wound tokens on this unit.
You may play this spell after an opponent declares attackers. Remove 1 exhaustion token from a target unit you control.
Change 3 dice in your active pool to a side of your choice.

[[side]] - [[exhaust]]: Remove an exhausted unit you control from play and place it face down under this spell._x000A__x000A_[[main]] - 1 [[time:class]]: Choose a unit underneath this spell and place it onto your battlefield. Place 1 status token on that unit.

When this spell comes into play, you may destroy a target exhausted unit with a charm die on it._x000A__x000A_[[side]] - [[exhaust]]: Choose a target unit. That unit cannot be declared as an attacker until the start of your next turn or the next round.

[[side]] - 1 [[ceremonial:power]]: Search your discard pile for an ally and place it into your hand. Deal 1 damage to your Phoenixborn.
Dive 1: When this unit is declared as an attacker, draw 1 card from the bottom of your draw pile.

Deal 2 damage to a target conjuration an opponent controls. If that destroyed the conjuration, place 1 exhaustion token on a ready spell that target opponent controls that has a printed effect that can place that conjuration onto the battlefield.

This spell can only be attached to an unexhausted Phoenixborn you control._x000A__x000A_* You cannot activate your Phoenixborn's ability._x000A__x000A_[[side]] - [[exhaust]]: Choose an ally you control and place it into your hand to deal 1 damage to a target unit an opponent controls.
Remove 1 exhaustion token from a target unit or place 1 exhaustion token on a target unit.

Draw 1 card. Remove 1 wound token from a target Phoenixborn. Raise 3 dice in your active pool one level.

After an ally you control is destroyed, place 1 status token on this spell if it has no status tokens on it._x000A__x000A_[[main]] - [[exhaust]]: Remove 1 status token from this spell to attach an [[Eroding]] conjured alteration spell to a target unit.

After an ally you control is destroyed, place 1 status token on this spell if it has no status tokens on it._x000A__x000A_[[side]] - [[exhaust]]: Remove 1 status token from this spell to add 1 to the attack value of a target unit you control for the remainder of the turn.

After an ally you control is destroyed, place 1 status token on this spell if it has no status tokens on it._x000A__x000A_[[side]] - [[exhaust]]: Remove 1 status token from this spell to deal 1 damage to a target Phoenixborn.

After an ally you control is destroyed, place 1 status token on this spell if it has no status tokens on it._x000A__x000A_[[main]] or [[side]] - [[exhaust]]: Remove 1 status token from this spell to move 1 wound token from a target unit onto another target unit.
After an ally you control is destroyed, place 1 status token on this spell if it has no status tokens on it._x000A__x000A_[[main]] - [[exhaust]]: Remove 1 status token from this spell to draw 1 card.
Place 1 exhaustion token on a target unit. Move 1 exhaustion token from a target unit to another unit controlled by the same player. Remove 1 exhaustion token from a target unit.

[[side]] - 1 [[charm:power]]: Place this die on a target unit an opponent controls without a charm die on it. While this die is on that unit, its attack value is reduced by 1. Place this die in your exhausted pool at the end of the round.

Subdue: When this unit comes into play, you may choose a charm die in your exhausted pool and resolve its dice power without paying its cost._x000A__x000A_Imbued: This unit's attack value is increased by 1 for each unit an opponent controls with a charm die on it.
Place 1 exhaustion token on a target unexhausted Phoenixborn an opponent controls. Deal 1 damage to that target Phoenixborn.
Choose 2 units you control. If you do, attach a [[Fire Adaptation]] conjured alteration spell to one and an [[Ice Adaptation]] conjured alteration spell to the other.
Choose an unexhausted unit you control. Deal damage to another target unit equal to the chosen unit's attack value. Then, place 1 wound token or 1 exhaustion token on the chosen unit you control.

[[main]] or [[side]] - [[exhaust]] - 2 [[basic]]: Place 1 status token on your Phoenixborn. Draw 1 card. You may play this spell after a unit an opponent controls is destroyed as a result of an attack you control. Remove 2 wound tokens and 1 exhaustion token from your Phoenixborn.
You may play this spell after an opponent resolves an action spell or activated Phoenixborn ability. Resolve a copy of that spell or ability without paying its play cost or activation cost.
You may play this spell after your Phoenixborn, while guarding, is dealt damage by a unit's attack. Prevent that damage from being received. Deal 1 damage to the target attacking unit.
You may play this spell after you declare attackers. Deal 1 damage to a target unit you control to deal 3 damage to a target unit.

You may play this spell after an opponent declares blockers. Choose an attacking ally you control that is blocked. It is no longer attacking. Place 1 exhaustion token on the target unit that was blocking the chosen ally.

Remove 2 status tokens from a target card or choose a target alteration spell. If that alteration spell is a conjured alteration spell, return it to its owner's conjuration pile. Otherwise, shuffle it into its owner's draw pile.
